paper_focus.title: A modified Johnson-Cook model to determine plastic flow behavior of Fe-30Mn-9Al-0.8 C low-density steel during warm multiaxial forging
paper_focus.research_objective: To understand the microstructural changes and their effect on mechanical properties during MAF of Fe-30Mn-9Al-0.8C low-density steel, and to develop a modified Johnson-Cook model incorporating dislocation density and grain size for accurate flow stress prediction.
